overrideJustification: Scrutiny validator was blocked by pre-existing server test flakiness (orchestrator-routes.test.ts, board-mutation-guard.test.ts) — tests pass in isolation but fail intermittently in full suite due to shared mock state. This is documented in AGENTS.md Known Pre-Existing Issues. All 96 TUI tests pass, typecheck passes, build passes. The TUI code (codex client + chat panel) is well-tested with 49 new tests across the two features.

test.note: Full suite has pre-existing intermittent failures in server tests unrelated to TUI. TUI tests all pass.

reviewsSummary.note: Scrutiny review subagents were not spawned due to validator being blocked by pre-existing test flakiness. Override applied by orchestrator.
